Conclusion: 仅进行英语安全评估是不够的，需要综合考虑文字系统家族、扰动类型以及每种语言的对齐覆盖范围。

Abstract: Safety alignment in large language models remains brittle across languages: prompts reliably refused in English can elicit harmful compliance in non-English and low-resource settings. We introduce \textsc{Minionese}, a multilingual jailbreak benchmark spanning 18 languages, 4 resource tiers, and 4 perturbation types (standard translation, code-switching, transliteration, and translationese), paired with a geometric mechanistic analysis of refusal failure across language tiers. We show that each attack type produces a distinct vulnerability profile: transliteration vulnerability is mediated by script identity, code-switching maintains effectiveness through the lowest-resource tier, and a sharp safety regime transition between Tiers 2 and 3 is consistent across all models. Mechanistically, low-resource jailbreaks succeed by routing harmful content through a geometrically misaligned subspace that projects insufficiently onto the refusal directions, leaving the refusal mechanism intact but untriggered. These findings show that English-only safety evaluations are insufficient; they require accounting for script family, perturbation type, and per-language alignment coverage. The benchmark and analysis code is at https://github.com/Brentkong/Minionese-Comprehensive-Benchmark-and-Mechanistic-Study-of-Multilingual-LLM-Safety.git.

</details>


### [330] [Toward Stronger Code Watermarking: A Grammar-Driven Approach to Optimizing the Trade-off Between Quality and Detectability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10210)
*Licheng Yu,Aiwei Liu,Songze Li*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 提出了一种面向代码生成的语法驱动水印方法GDW，通过语法引导的三级掩码机制和结构角色感知调制，在保持代码质量的同时提升了水印的可检测性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于logits的水印方法直接应用于代码生成面临挑战，因为代码的低熵特性加剧了代码质量与水印可检测性之间的权衡。

Method: 提出Grammar-Driven Watermark (GDW)方法，包括：(1) 语法引导的三级掩码机制保持句法有效性；(2) 结构角色感知调制，对内容承载token施加更强偏置，对语法关键token施加更保守偏置；(3) 角色感知加权检测统计量提升可检测性。

Result: 在多种编程语言、模型和解码策略上的实验表明，GDW比现有方法建立了更强的质量-可检测性权衡前沿，且对变量重命名攻击具有鲁棒性。

Conclusion: GDW通过语法感知的方式有效解决了代码生成中水印质量与可检测性的权衡问题，为代码水印提供了更优的方案。

Abstract: With the rapid development of Large Language Models (LLMs), text watermarking has emerged as a crucial technique for identifying machine-generated content. However, directly applying existing logits-based watermarking methods to code generation remains challenging, since the low-entropy nature of code exacerbates the trade-off between code quality and watermark detectability. In this paper, we propose a novel code watermarking approach called Grammar-Driven Watermark (GDW) for LLMs. GDW preserves syntactic validity through a grammar-guided three-level masking mechanism and injects watermark signals via structural role-aware modulation, assigning a stronger bias to content-bearing tokens while applying a more conservative bias to syntax-critical tokens. Aligning with the generation process, we further design a role-aware weighted detection statistic to improve detectability. Experiments across multiple programming languages, models, and decoding strategies show that GDW establishes a stronger quality-detectability trade-off frontier than existing methods, while maintaining robustness against variable-renaming attacks.

</details>


### [331] [One Token Is Enough: Fingerprinting and Verifying Large Language Models from Single-Token Output Distributions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10252)
*Tomas Bruckner*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出通过单词提示（如"在1到100之间随机说一个数字"）收集LLM的答案分布，构建行为指纹来验证模型身份，仅需约100次查询即可达到7.3%等错误率的验证效果，并在OpenRouter上发现了模型标签与行为不符的异常情况。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM通过不透明的服务链交付，客户端无法确认实际运行的模型是否与声称的一致，审计发现大量商业端点存在偏差，而现有识别技术成本高、依赖模型合作或需要对抗性提示。

Method: 定义LLM行为指纹为对简单单词提示（"在1到100之间随机说一个数字"）在四种语言下的答案经验分布。使用165个模型通过OpenRouter收集数据，计算分布熵、Jensen-Shannon散度进行模型分类和谱系恢复，并设计生物识别风格的验证协议。

Result: 分布高度非均匀（中位数单元熵1.0比特），同一模型分半样本距离比不同模型小一个数量级；JS散度可以59.5%的留一法准确率恢复模型家族（随机基线18.4%）；40单元电池的等错误率7.3%，8个探针单元即可低于11%。发现某专有旗舰模型与开源Qwen模型分布不可区分。

Conclusion: 极低成本（每次查询仅1个输出token）的行为指纹可有效用于LLM身份验证和生态监测，已开源全部协议、提示、数据和代码。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly consumed through opaque serving chains - API aggregators, resellers, and inference providers - in which the client has no technical means to confirm that the model answering is the model advertised, and recent audits show that a substantial fraction of commercial endpoints deviate from the vendor's reference weights. Existing identification techniques require long generated texts, token-level log-probabilities, adversarially crafted prompts, or the model owner's cooperation. We show that far weaker evidence suffices. We define a behavioral fingerprint of an LLM as the empirical distribution of its answers to trivial one-word prompts - "name a random number between 1 and 100" - collected across four languages at a cost of one output token per query. Measuring 165 models served via a large commercial aggregator (OpenRouter), we find that (i) these distributions are highly non-uniform (median cell entropy 1.0 bit) and model-specific: split halves of the same model's samples lie an order of magnitude closer than samples of different models; (ii) Jensen-Shannon divergence between fingerprints recovers model lineage, assigning a model to its documented family with 59.5% leave-one-out accuracy against an 18.4% chance rate; and (iii) a biometric-style verification protocol achieves a 7.3% equal error rate with the full 40-cell battery, and below 11% with eight probe cells - roughly a hundred single-token queries per audit. We further report ecosystem anomalies, including a proprietary-branded flagship endpoint distributionally indistinguishable from an open-weight Qwen model. The protocol, prompts, raw data, and analysis code are released for reproduction and operational use.

</details>


### [332] [Devil in the Lens: Analyzing and Defending Physical Prompt Injection Against Vision-Language Models on Wearable Devices](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10269)
*Yaxin Li,Hao Wang,Yanda Shao,Shuhao Zhang,Yan Long*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文揭示了视觉-语言模型（VLM）在可穿戴设备（如AI眼镜）中面临的新型物理世界提示注入攻击风险：环境中的恶意文本可劫持模型行为，在200多个真实场景中测试12种模型，攻击成功率最高达96%，并提出了两种防御策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究已证明VLM面临数字图像输入的视觉提示注入风险，但物理环境与可穿戴智能设备深度融合带来的独特安全挑战（如AI眼镜中环境文本恶意注入）尚未被充分探索。

Method: 在200多个真实环境中，使用AI眼镜物理拍摄照片，识别出6种代表性的物理注入攻击向量，并在12种VLM模型上评估攻击效果，同时提出基于掩码的外部过滤器和基于语义向量的内部检测器两种防御策略。

Result: 物理注入攻击在真实和模拟场景中分别达到高达96%和60%的攻击成功率，模型对环境文本表现出过度盲目信任，甚至忽略实际视觉上下文产生完全相反的输出。

Conclusion: 物理提示注入攻击对VLM可穿戴设备构成严重安全威胁，所提出的两种防御策略能够有效降低攻击成功率和安全影响。

Abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are rapidly deployed on human-facing wearable devices such as smart glasses to enable multimodal perception and AI-assisted decision-making. While prior research has demonstrated the risks of visual prompt injection into digital image inputs of VLMs, the unique security challenges posed by the increasing integration between physical environments and wearable intelligence, such as those embodied in VLM-enabled AI glasses, remain underexplored. Toward understanding and modeling such threats, our work characterizes how malicious textual information embedded in physical environments introduces a high-priority visual channel for indirect prompt injection, where scene texts that hinder or evade human perception could hijack VLM models' behavior. Such \textit{Physical Prompt Injection Attacks} can not only disrupt normal tasks of VLM-enabled wearable devices, but also steer models to produce profane, biased, or even untruthful outputs. Using physically captured photos from AI glasses in over 200 real-world environments, our analysis identifies 6 representative threat vectors of physically injected prompts, and further evaluates their impacts on 12 VLM models. Results show that these attacks consistently manipulate model outputs across integrity- and safety-critical tasks, achieving attack success rates of up to 96\% and 60\% in simulated and real-world settings. Our analysis confirms that multiple models exhibit excessive blind trust in environmental text, ignoring the actual visual context and producing completely opposite summaries or directives. We further propose two targeted defense strategies, including a mask-based external filter and a semantic-vector-based internal detector, to effectively reduce the success rate and safety impact of these attacks.

</details>


### [333] [Understanding Implicit Trust Errors in Core Carrier Networks through Multi-Agent Flaw Discovery and Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10315)
*Ziyu Lin,Ziting Wang,Xinfeng Li,Wei Dong,XiaoFeng Wang*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文发现云化核心网中存在一种名为"隐式信任错误(iTrue)"的漏洞模式，并设计了基于LLM的多智能体系统iFinder，在7个开源核心网实现中发现了84个未知漏洞，其中83个已确认、81个已分配CVE编号。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着核心网向云原生架构迁移，内部接口不再物理隔离，攻击面扩大，而现有安全分析缺乏对此类"盲目信任"漏洞的系统性研究。

Method: 通过GitHub问题根因分析归纳iTrue模式；设计LLM驱动的多智能体系统iFinder，包含漏洞总结、检测模式提炼、新漏洞发现等模块；采用3GPP规范与代码交叉验证抑制幻觉；利用LLM生成PoC漏洞利用并迭代验证。

Result: 在7个开源CN实现中发现84个新漏洞，83个已确认，81个获CVE；发现一个影响真实商用5G核心网的会话劫持漏洞。

Conclusion: 核心网内部组件的隐式信任是一个严重安全威胁，iFinder能有效发现此类漏洞，LLM驱动的自动化安全分析在关键基础设施领域具有重要价值。

Abstract: Cellular core networks (CNs) are critical infrastructure, yet their internal security model has historically relied on physical isolation: interfaces between core components often operate within an assumed trust zone. As CNs transition to cloud-native deployments, this assumption weakens, expanding the attack surface and enabling external adversaries to reach previously internal interfaces. From a root-cause analysis of security flaws reported in GitHub issues for opensource CN implementations, we found a recurring pattern of blind trust among CN components. Components may omit syntactic validation, fail to enforce semantic invariants, or allocate resources without checking availability. Once internal interfaces become reachable, these weaknesses can lead to severe impacts such as denial of service and session hijacking. We call these vulnerabilities implicit trust errors (iTrue). To detect iTrues and understand their security impacts, we designed iFinder, an LLM-driven multi-agent system that summarizes known flaws, distills them into detection patterns, and applies them to discover new iTrues in CN implementations. To suppress hallucinations produced by large language models (LLMs), we built an innovative strategy that crosschecks both 3GPP specifications and CN code to capture existing protection missed by the agents. Further, we developed a technique that uses LLMs to generate proof-of-concept (PoC) exploits for potential iTrues and iteratively refine the PoCs by automatically executing them against CN implementations and analyzing results. Running iFinder on seven prominent open-source CN implementations, we discovered 84 previously unknown vulnerabilities. Among them, 83 have already been confirmed and 81 have been assigned CVEs. Importantly, a session-hijacking flaw has been confirmed on real-world commercial 5G core networks.

</details>


### [334] [Large Language Models in Misinformation Ecosystems: Misuse, Defense, and Vulnerability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10402)
*Lingwei Wei,Dou Hu,Wei Zhou,Songlin Hu,Philip S. Yu*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出一个角色-层次框架，系统地分析了大语言模型（LLM）在 misinformation 领域中作为攻击者、防御者和易受攻击组件的多重角色，涵盖内容、社会语境、证据来源和验证工作流四个层次，并总结了相关攻击、检测方法及防御对策，最后指出了三个未来关键挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM 的滥用已将 misinformation 从内容中心问题转变为生态系统级安全挑战，现有研究缺乏统一框架来系统性地梳理 LLM 带来的新风险及防御方法。

Method: 提出角色-层次（role-layer）框架：角色维度包括攻击者、防御者和易受攻击组件；层次维度包括内容、社会语境、证据环境和验证工作流。基于该框架对 LLM 相关攻击、检测与防御进行系统性分类与综述。

Result: 系统梳理了 LLM 在 misinformation 生态中的攻击与防御全景，识别出三个方面（内容、社会语境、证据、验证工作流）的风险，并总结了现有检测与防御方法。

Conclusion: 三个关键挑战：（1）从静态检测准确率转向预算约束下的生态系统级风险评估；（2）加固以 LLM 为中心的验证流水线以对抗 adversarial 操作；（3）部署可审计的人机协同验证系统以实现可信的现实世界 misinformation 防御。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have transformed misinformation from a primarily content-centric problem into a broader ecosystem-level security challenge. When misused, LLMs create risks beyond false content generation, enabling attacks on the social contexts, evidence sources, retrieval corpora, and verification workflows that misinformation defense depends on. In this paper, we introduce a role-layer framework to unify these risks and defenses. The role dimension characterizes LLMs as attackers, defenders, and vulnerable components of verification systems, while the layer dimension covers content, social contexts, evidence environments, and verification workflows. Guided by this framework, we organize LLM-enabled attacks, investigate LLM-based detection and verification methods, analyze vulnerabilities in LLM-centric detection paradigms, and discuss existing countermeasures against LLM-enabled attacks. Building on this synthesis, we identify three key open challenges: moving from static detection accuracy to budgeted ecosystem-level risk evaluation, hardening LLM-centered verification pipelines against adversarial manipulation, and deploying auditable human-in-the-loop verification systems for trustworthy real-world misinformation defense.

</details>


### [335] [Threat Vectors and the State of the Art in Defense Methods for Security in Neurotechnology](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10451)
*Bryce-Allen Bagley,Nathaniel Rose,Quintus Kilbourn,Matthew Canham*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文综述了脑机接口（BCI）技术的快速发展及其在神经安全（neurosecurity）方面的严重滞后问题，全面调查了BCI系统面临的各类安全威胁，并提出了可立即应用的网络安全、硬件安全和机器学习领域的现有解决方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: BCI技术发展迅速，已进入临床试验和消费市场，但神经安全研究严重滞后于BCI本身的能力发展，存在大量安全漏洞亟待解决。

Method: 本文采用综述方法，对神经安全领域现状进行系统性回顾，全面调查BCI系统面临的已确立和高度可能的安全威胁，并推荐来自网络安全、硬件安全和机器学习领域的现有方法。

Result: 梳理了BCI系统面临的广泛且复杂的安全威胁，并提供了可直接应用于弥补神经安全差距的多种现有方法。

Conclusion: 为尽快解决尽可能多的BCI系统漏洞，应积极将来自网络安全、硬件安全和机器学习领域的成熟方法应用于神经安全领域。

Abstract: Brain-computer interfaces (BCIs) are a class of diverse hardware modalities, associated software, and connected devices which are widely used in a variety of fields, including neurosurgery, biomedical data analysis, and neuroimaging. Recent years have seen rapid advancements in BCI technology, and neurotechnology more broadly, with the first devices now passing clinical trials, early examples of consumer hardware entering the market, and many variants of consumer and medical hardware with increasingly extensive capabilities being developed rapidly. However, research and development in security for BCIs--known as neurosecurity--lags significantly behind the capabilities of BCIs themselves. In an effort to address as many vulnerabilities as feasible immediately, in this paper we review the current state of the art in neurosecurity, thoroughly survey the breadth and complexity of both firmly established and highly probable security threats to BCI systems, and provide recommendations of existing methods from cybersecurity, hardware security, and machine learning which can immediately be applied to address some of these gaps in neurosecurity.

</details>


### [336] [Firewall3D: A Hardware Firewall for Defending 3D Printers Against Firmware Attacks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10484)
*Seyed Ali Ghazi Asgar,Narasimha Reddy*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出Firewall3D，一种基于硬件的3D打印机防火墙解决方案，通过监控物理层信号（步进电机电流、限位开关、温度、冷却风扇等）来检测固件攻击，实验证明能有效识别破坏打印完整性、损坏设备或泄露知识产权的攻击。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 3D打印市场规模超300亿美元，但针对增材制造系统的网络安全攻击日益增多，尤其是固件级别攻击（供应链攻击、恶意固件更新、内部威胁），现有缺乏有效的硬件防御手段。

Method: 提出Firewall3D硬件防火墙方案，持续监控物理层信号（步进电机电流、限位开关状态、喷头和热床温度、冷却风扇等），验证实际物理行为是否与预期的G-code执行一致。

Result: 实验证明Firewall3D能够有效检测多种固件攻击，包括破坏打印完整性、损坏打印机组件或泄露知识产权的攻击，检测到异常后立即触发警报并停止打印。

Conclusion: 基于硬件的物理层监控可以有效防御3D打印机的固件级别攻击，在检测到异常行为时及时中断打印过程，防止进一步损害。

Abstract: As the 3D printing market continues to grow rapidly, with an estimated value exceeding $30 billion, cybersecurity risks and attacks targeting additive manufacturing systems are also increasing. These attacks aim to sabotage printed components, steal intellectual property, or even physically damage the 3D printer itself. One major cybersecurity threat in this domain is firmware level attacks, which can be introduced through supply chain compromises, malicious firmware updates, or insider threats that deploy modified firmware to manipulate printer behavior. To defend against such threats, we propose a dedicated hardware based security solution,Firewall3D, that acts as a hardware firewall for 3D printers. Firewall3D continuously monitors physical layer signals, including stepper motor currents, end stop switches, nozzle and bed temperatures and cooling fans, to verify that the printer's physical behavior matches the intended G-code execution. Our experimental results demonstrate that Firewall3D can effectively detect a wide range of firmware attacks that could compromise print integrity, damage printer components, or leak intellectual property. Upon detecting abnormal behavior, the system can immediately trigger an alarm and halt the printing process, thereby preventing further damage and risks.

</details>


### [337] [Temporary Authority, Permanent Effects: Commit-Time Authorization for LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10487)
*Igor Santos-Grueiro*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文研究LLM智能体中持久化效果的授权边界问题，提出“提交时授权”概念，构建了54个任务的受控失效测试套件，发现端点成功率虽高但授权完成率仅20%，并评估了多种防御策略，最终提出CommitGuard边界监控机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM智能体在执行过程中依赖早期有效的权威证据（如DOM快照、审批epoch等）来提交持久化效果，但证据可能在提交前失效，导致未授权提交。需要系统研究这种授权边界失效问题。

Method: 1) 定义commit-time authorization属性，要求证据在提交时仍保持新鲜、因果优先、绑定相同效果且有效。2) 构建受控失效测试套件，覆盖浏览器、工具/API和多智能体工作流。3) 设计54个主要任务矩阵，在其中271次运行中评估端点成功率和授权完成率。4) 评估多种防御策略（提示谨慎、单条件检查、刷新/重绑定/重规划/拒绝等）。5) 提出CommitGuard边界监控机制。

Result: 在54个任务矩阵中：端点成功率262/270（97%），授权完成率仅55/270（20%）。216个失效行中207个在授权路径失效后仍提交。54个干净对照组全部授权，54个授权保持检查无未授权提交。提示谨慎和单条件检查不足，CommitGuard有效阻止了受保护提交面上的持久化尝试。

Conclusion: 端点成功是效用指标，授权提交才是安全属性。提交时授权边界是LLM智能体安全的关键，需要刷新、重绑定、重规划或拒绝等机制在持久化边界处执行防御。

Abstract: LLM agents can commit durable effects from authority evidence that was valid earlier in execution: a DOM snapshot, approval epoch, version witness, branch token, or worker result. We study the commit boundary at which earlier authority evidence no longer authorizes a durable effect. We call this property commit-time authorization: a durable effect is authorized only if the witness that licensed its derived state remains fresh, causally prior, bound to the same effect, and eligible at commit time.
  We build a controlled-invalidation suite spanning browser, tool/API, and multi-agent workflows. The suite preserves the user goal and payload shape while invalidating the authority relation before durability. In the primary 54-task matrix, endpoint success remains high: 262/270 runs reach the visible result. Only 55/270 are authorized completions; among the 216 invalidating rows, 207 commit after the authorizing path has failed. All 54 clean controls remain authorized, and a separate 54-run authority-preserving check produces no unauthorized commits.
  We then evaluate mitigation families. Prompt caution and single-condition checks are insufficient because different hazards break different boundary conditions. Defenses work when they refresh, rebind, replan, or refuse at the durability boundary. CommitGuard, a fail-closed boundary monitor, blocks stale durable-effect attempts on protected commit surfaces when runtimes emit witness, dependency, binding, and eligibility signals.
  The result is a reporting and runtime-design lesson: endpoint success is a utility metric; authorized commit is a security property.

</details>


### [338] [Mako: A Self-Evolving Agentic Operating System (SE-AOS) for Autonomous Web Exploitation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11288)
*Praneeth Narisetty,Shiva Nagendra Babu Kore*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出自进化智能体操作系统（SE-AOS）及其实例Mako，一个能将自身失败转化为新能力的自主Web漏洞利用引擎。在104个CTF式Web应用的基准测试中实现100%覆盖，核心发现是：自主利用的瓶颈在于能力而非推理，能力一旦存在且可被发现，难度就会消失。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI安全代理缺乏自我进化能力，无法在运行时从失败中学习并自主扩展自身漏洞利用能力，导致自动化攻防受限于预定义能力集。

Method: 将智能体架构设计为可变、可版本化的操作系统内核，在运行时观察自身失败、合成新能力、在目标上验证、然后热加载回自身。采用门控自进化循环，通过沙箱评估确保性能不退化后才提交改进。

Result: 在XBOW基准测试的104个容器化CTF式Web应用（涵盖26种漏洞类型、3个难度层级）上实现100%覆盖率，每个目标均生成加密新鲜且可验证的flag。

Conclusion: 自主利用的核心规律是：能力而非推理才是稀缺资源；一旦能力存在且可被发现，漏洞利用的难度就会消失。该系统具有双重用途研究性质，故公开科学原理但保留武器化载荷。

Abstract: We introduce the Self-Evolving Agentic Operating System (SE-AOS): a new class of AI agent that treats exploit capability as a mutable, versioned kernel it extends at runtime, observing its own failures, synthesising new capabilities, proving them against a live target, and hot-loading them back into itself. Mako is the first SE-AOS instance for security research and the autonomous web exploitation engine developed within LaunchSafe. LaunchSafe builds autonomous security agents for continuous offensive testing and agent-driven security research; Mako is the core engine behind that platform. On the public XBOW validation-benchmarks, 104 containerised, CTF-style web applications spanning 26 vulnerability classes across three difficulty tiers, Mako achieves full-suite coverage: it drives every one of the 104 targets to emit a cryptographically fresh, per-build flag, under a verification regime that makes fabricated or memorised results impossible. Our central result is a law of autonomous exploitation: once a capability exists and is discoverable, difficulty collapses; capability, not reasoning, is what is scarce, together with an architecture and formalism that turn that law into a self-improving system. Mako further runs a gated self-evolution loop that proposes, sandboxes, and commits improvements to its own agents and rules when fitness does not regress. We deliberately withhold the operational results, payloads, exploit chains, and tool source, because a system that reduces full-spectrum web exploitation to a repeatable, machine-speed pipeline is dual-use research of concern. We publish the science; we withhold the weapon.

</details>


### [339] [NetInjectBench: Benchmarking Indirect Prompt Injection in Tool-Using Large Language Model Agents for Network Operations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10490)
*Ruksat Khan Shayoni,Muhammad Faraz Shoaib,S M Asif Hossain,M. F. Mridha*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: NetInjectBench是一个针对网络运维场景中工具调用型LLM智能体的提示注入基准测试。实验表明，元数据感知的策略门控在保持高可用性的同时，能够将不安全操作率降至0%（上界1.58%），显著优于纯提示防御方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 网络运维中的工单、告警、日志等非可信文本可能携带间接提示注入攻击，威胁LLM智能体的工具调用安全性，亟需系统性的评估基准和防御方案。

Method: 构建了包含130个场景的NetInjectBench基准，区分非可信文本、可信策略元数据和评估标签；测试了朴素执行、纯提示防御、Self-Reminder、Spotlighting、两阶段LLM Judge、静态白名单和元数据感知策略门控等多种防御方法。

Result: 朴素执行下不安全工具操作率为82.50%；纯提示防御降至25.63%-10.00%；静态白名单降至5.00%但完全阻塞了所有获批变更；元数据感知策略门控将不安全操作率降至0%（95% Wilson上界1.58%），同时保持了99.17%的攻击场景可用性和100.00%的获批变更可用性。

Conclusion: 网络运维智能体需要执行时授权边界（即元数据感知的策略门控）与提示级指令卫生相结合，才能有效防御间接提示注入攻击。

Abstract: Tool-using large language model (LLM) agents are attractive for network operations, but tickets, alerts, logs, runbooks, and ChatOps messages can carry indirect prompt injections. We present NetInjectBench, a 130-scenario benchmark that separates untrusted artifact text, trusted policy metadata, and evaluation labels for network-operation tool use. The sample contains 40 benign, 40 weak-attack, 40 strong-attack, and 10 approved high-impact change scenarios; each is evaluated with Qwen2.5-7B, Llama3.1-8B, and Mistral-7B. Across 240 attack instances, naive execution reached an 82.50% unsafe tool-action rate. Prompt-only safety, Self-Reminder, Spotlighting, and a Two-Pass LLM Judge reduced this rate to 25.63%, 21.67%, 18.33%, and 10.00%, respectively. Static allowlisting reached 5.00% but blocked all approved changes, yielding 0.00% usefulness and 100.00% overblocking on approved cases. Under the stated metadata-integrity assumption, the metadata-aware policy gate produced 0/240 unsafe attack actions, with a 95% Wilson upper bound of 1.58%, while preserving 99.17% attack-scenario usefulness and 100.00% approved-change usefulness. The findings show that network-operation agents need execution-time authorization boundaries alongside prompt-level instruction hygiene.

</details>


### [340] [PromptGraph: Graph-Guided Prompt Sanitization for Balancing Privacy and Utility in LLM Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10709)
*Chen Gu,Hui Wan,Donghui Hu,Hui Wang,Zhuoer Gu*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 提出PromptGraph，一种基于图引导的提示消毒方法，通过将提示建模为属性图（节点表示跨度级隐私分数，边表示上下文依赖关系），在保护隐私的同时最大化保留效用，平衡隐私与效用的关系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有消毒方法通常独立处理每个文本跨度，忽略了跨度之间的上下文关联，导致隐私保护与效用保留之间的平衡不佳。LLM服务存在从上下文关联中推断敏感信息的隐私风险。

Method: 将每个提示表示为属性图，节点带有跨度级隐私分数，边编码上下文依赖关系；通过优化目标选择受保护跨度集，最大化隐私增益同时惩罚上下文依赖损失；对受保护跨度进行局部消毒，并通过局部一致性检查恢复占位符。

Result: 实验表明PromptGraph在隐私与效用之间的平衡优于现有的提示隐私基线方法。

Conclusion: 通过显式建模跨度间的上下文依赖关系，图引导的提示消毒方法能够更有效地平衡隐私保护与效用保留。

Abstract: Large Language Model (LLM) services introduce a fundamental privacy challenge. Sensitive information may be inferred not only from explicit identifiers, such as names or phone numbers, but also from contextual associations among otherwise innocuous spans. Existing sanitizers typically assign privacy or utility signals to individual spans without explicitly modeling pairwise relationships among them. In this paper, we propose PromptGraph, a graph-guided prompt-sanitization approach for privacy-preserving LLM inference. PromptGraph estimates privacy leakage at the span level and utility-relevant contextual dependencies between pairs of spans. It represents each prompt as an attributed graph, in which nodes carry span-level privacy scores and edges encode contextual dependencies needed to preserve utility. The sanitization objective selects a protected span set that maximizes privacy gain while penalizing the loss of contextual dependencies. This formulation explicitly balances privacy and utility when contextual evidence is hidden. Protected spans are sanitized locally, and returned placeholders are restored only after passing local consistency checks. We conduct extensive experiments showing that PromptGraph achieves a more favorable balance between privacy and utility than prompt-privacy baselines.

</details>


### [341] [When Local Monitors Miss Compositional Harm: Diagnosing Distributed Backdoors in Multi-Agent Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11751)
*Yibo Hu,Ren Wang*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 论文揭示了多智能体工具型LLM系统中的安全漏洞：分布式后门攻击可将恶意负载拆分到多个智能体中，绕过每一步的局部监控，只有组合后才能构成攻击。论文形式化了"可观测性边界"概念，证明一旦碎片在监控视角下看起来良性，任何检测器都无法捕获。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多智能体、使用工具的LLM系统部署时，常用的安全防护是运行时监控器，但作者发现这种逐步骤检查的方式存在根本性漏洞，即分布式后门攻击可以绕过局部检测。

Method: (1) 形式化定义"可观测性边界"概念；(2) 理论证明一旦碎片在监控视角下表现为良性，任何检测器都无法捕获；(3) 在控制测试床、外部基准和端到端智能体运行中进行实验验证。

Result: 局部监控在局部证据消失时完全丢失信号，只有当监控器看到组合对象时才恢复信号。仅用良性流量训练的监控器能恢复攻击代码结构（AUROC 0.874），解码器门控能阻止所有测试攻击。但全迹监控和编码器仍可能失败，除非它们到达暴露负载的表示层。

Conclusion: 局部安全不等于全局安全，当危害是组合式的时。核心挑战是找到能暴露组合后恶意负载的表示层。

Abstract: As multi-agent, tool-using LLM systems are deployed, a common safety net is a runtime monitor that checks each message, tool call, or step on its own. We show this net has a fundamental hole. A distributed backdoor splits a harmful payload across agents, so every local check passes while the assembled object is the attack. The monitor can be right on every step and still miss the attack. The problem is not splitting itself: split fragments can still leak suspicious tokens or provenance edges. The hard case is \emph{local benignness}. No fragment carries the harm, and what is left looks like ordinary benign traffic. We formalize this as an \emph{observability boundary}: a monitor catches only what its view can tell apart from benign traffic. We prove that once the fragments look benign in the monitored view, no detector on that view can catch them, however strong it is. Across a controlled testbed, an external benchmark, and end-to-end agent runs, local monitors lose the signal exactly as local evidence disappears, and it returns only when the monitor sees the assembled object. A monitor trained only on benign traffic recovers the attack's code structure across held-out encodings (0.874 mean AUROC). A decoded-view gate, given the encoding family, blocks every tested attack. But seeing more is not enough: full-trace monitors and decoders still fail unless they reach the representation where the payload is exposed. Local safety is not global safety when harm is compositional, and the open problem is finding that representation.

</details>


### [342] [Distributed Denial of Science: How Indirect Data Poisoning of AI Systems Can Industrialize Scientific Fraud](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10712)
*Bálint Gyevnár,Atoosa Kasirzadeh,Nihar B. Shah*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出并验证了一种新型科学欺诈攻击——间接数据投毒。攻击者通过污染公开数据集并上传至公共仓库，诱使自主AI研究代理在诚实使用中无意传播虚假结论。在450次实验中，攻击成功率达49.56%，而检测率仅6.0%。提出两种缓解措施：科学家角色提示和数据溯源审计，后者可将攻击成功率降至零。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着AI越来越多地自动化科学研究，一个恶意实体能否通过远程攻击，利用科学家对AI的诚实使用，从而大规模破坏科学诚信？传统科学欺诈需要公司资源（资金、代写文章、腐败学者），而AI时代攻击门槛可能大幅降低。

Method: 作者设计并实验评估了一种"间接数据投毒"攻击：攻击者污染开放数据集并上传至公开仓库，自主研究代理在检索和处理数据时无意中使用了被污染的数据。在5个社会敏感话题上，使用3种前沿AI系统（Claude Code、Codex、Gemini CLI），进行了450次符合伦理的实验。同时提出了两种缓解措施：科学家角色提示（scientist persona）和包含5项检查的数据溯源审计。

Result: 投毒攻击在49.56%的实验运行中成功，而投毒检测率仅为6.0%。攻击无需特定触发词、代理访问权限、间接提示注入或伪造论文，仅需开放数据生态系统和误导性元数据。科学家角色提示缓解后仍有16.67%的运行得出被投毒结论，但数据溯源审计将攻击成功率降至零。

Conclusion: 间接数据投毒可能以前所未有的规模实现科学欺诈，但通过代理在数据检索时的适当审计可以有效缓解此类攻击。

Abstract: Scientific fraud is the instrument of doubt that malicious entities can use to establish controversy in science. Historically, it required the resources of a company: deep pockets, ghostwritten articles, and corrupt academics. Today, Artificial Intelligence (AI) is increasingly automating scientific research, so we ask: Can a remote adversary weaponize the honest use of AI in science to compromise scientific integrity? We envision and empirically evaluate a new attack, indirect data poisoning, in which an adversary corrupts an open dataset and uploads the poisoned variant to a public repository. Autonomous research agents may independently retrieve and process this data, turning honest scientists into the unpaid and unwitting distributors of fraud at scale. Across five socially-salient topics, from hiring discrimination to the safety of autonomous vehicles, three widely used frontier AI systems (Claude Code with Claude Opus 4.7, Codex with GPT-5.5, Gemini CLI with Gemini 3.1 Pro), and 450 ethically contained experimental runs, we find that poisoning succeeds in 49.56% of runs, while the rate of poisoning detection is only 6.0%. The attack requires no topic-specific trigger-words, agent access, indirect prompt injection, or fabricated papers, only the open data ecosystem and misleading metadata. To mitigate the attacks, we propose and evaluate two measures: a scientist persona and a data provenance audit with five checks (referencing papers, social markers, statistical anomalies, related datasets, poisoning caution). We find that the persona still leaves 16.67% of runs with a poisoned conclusion, but provenance auditing reduces attack success rate to zero. Our results suggest that indirect data poisoning may enable scientific fraud at unprecedented scale, but these attacks can be mitigated with suitable auditing by agents during data retrieval.

</details>


### [343] [A Verifier-Centric Conceptual Model for Digital Credential Ecosystems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10747)
*Shigeya Suzuki,Ryosuke Abe*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种以验证者为中心的概念模型，通过将凭证处理分解为签名验证(L1)、语义解释(L2)和验证(L3)三层，并结合宪法(生态系统级信任安排)与物流(验证材料的存储与传递)两个正交平面，以及位置、时间、披露三个维度，来解释数字凭证生态系统中互操作性失败的根本原因，并通过四个学习凭证栈和现有生态系统的案例验证了模型的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数字凭证生态系统因跨辖区和跨应用域的独立演化而缺乏互操作性，传统的逐元素比较方法无法解释即使共享数据模型时互操作性仍然失败的原因，也无法明确验证者需要获取和信任什么才能接受凭证。

Method: 提出以验证者为中心的概念模型，包含两个分解：(1) 将凭证处理分为L1(签名验证)、L2(语义解释)、L3(验证)三层，并通过宪法和物流两个正交平面建模支持材料；(2) 将每个功能沿位置、时间、披露三个维度定位。从"可验证"条件推导出七项推论，区分为定义性推论、操作性含义和设计权衡。

Result: 将该模型应用于四个学习凭证栈以及包括认证联盟在内的现有生态系统，证明其能够解释逐元素比较无法解决的互操作性失败、验证者负担、离线可验证性、隐私影响和术语歧义等问题。

Conclusion: 提出的验证者中心概念模型能够有效解释数字凭证互操作性失败的根本原因，弥补了传统逐元素比较方法的不足，为理解和设计可互操作的数字凭证系统提供了更全面的分析框架。

Abstract: Digital credential ecosystems increasingly combine multiple standards. Because implementations have evolved independently across jurisdictions and application domains, systems described under the common label ``digital credential'' often remain mutually non-interoperable. Conventional element-by-element comparisons of identifiers, data models, credential formats, protocols, and signature algorithms do not explain why interoperability fails even when stacks share a data model, nor do they identify what a verifier must obtain, and what it must trust, before accepting a credential. We present a verifier-centric conceptual model built on two decompositions. The first separates credential processing into signature verification (L1), semantic interpretation (L2), and validation (L3), and models the supporting materials through two orthogonal planes: Constitution, which captures ecosystem-level arrangements and trust declarations, and Logistics, which captures how verification materials are stored and delivered; the Shinken framework makes trust assumptions explicit across all five functions. The second characterizes where each function may be placed along three dimensions (placement, timing, and disclosure). From the condition of being verifiable, the model derives seven consequences, distinguished as definitional corollaries, operational implications, and design trade-offs. Applying the model to four learner-credential stacks and to existing ecosystems including authentication federations, we show that it explains interoperability failures, verifier-side burden, offline verifiability, privacy implications, and terminological ambiguities that element-wise comparison leaves unresolved.

</details>


### [344] [Can Watermarking Techniques Help Prevent LLM Model Stealing?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10794)
*Elette Boyle,MohammadTaghi Hajiaghayi,Keivan Rezaei,Suho Shin,Amos Stern*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文针对语言模型窃取攻击提出基于水印技术的防御方法，通过扰动logits层防止攻击者提取隐藏层维度等模型信息，并在保持模型效用的同时实现有效防御。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有模型窃取攻击（如Carlini等人提出的方法）能够从黑盒商用语言模型中提取精确信息，包括隐藏层维度等关键架构参数，亟需有效的防御手段。

Method: 借鉴水印技术思想，对语言模型的logits层进行扰动，从而干扰攻击者提取模型信息的能力。在不同配置下进行了实证实验验证防御效果。

Result: 实验结果表明，所提出的防御方法在多种配置下均能有效阻止模型窃取攻击，同时模型质量仅受到可接受的轻微影响。

Conclusion: 该防御方法能够在保护模型隐私（防止架构信息泄露）与保持模型可用性之间取得良好平衡，是一种实用的对抗模型窃取攻击的方案。

Abstract: Model stealing attacks have recently been introduced, enabling the extraction of precise information from black-box commercial language models. In this work, we propose defense methods against a recent attack of \cite{carlini2024stealing} and extensions for extracting the hidden layer dimension of production language models. Our methods are inspired by watermarking techniques that perturb the logits layer of these models to prevent such attacks. We provide empirical experiments demonstrating the effectiveness of the proposed defense versus model quality degradation across various configurations, and propose an effective defense against such attacks while preserving model utility.

</details>


### [345] [Automated Stealthy Wear-Out Attack on Digital Twins With Deep Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10830)
*Joshua Haworth,Aryan Pasikhani,George Pavlides,Prosanta Gope,John Clark*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于深度强化学习的隐蔽磨损攻击，针对数字孪生基础设施，通过隐秘操控控制信号加速机器人关节磨损，实验表明SAC算法在攻击效果和隐蔽性上表现最优，凸显了数字孪生环境面临的新型安全威胁。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 数字孪生在工业4.0中广泛应用，但其虚实交互特性扩大了攻击面，现有研究缺乏对利用深度强化学习进行隐蔽物理磨损攻击的深入分析。

Method: 采用深度强化学习（对比TD3、SAC、PPO、A2C算法）训练对抗智能体，隐秘操控机器人关节控制信号以增加扭矩，同时规避异常检测系统。

Result: SAC算法在样本效率、稳定性和攻击效果上最优；攻击能显著提升目标关节扭矩，加速退化并增加维护成本，且未被检测系统发现。

Conclusion: 深度强化学习驱动的隐蔽攻击对数字孪生环境构成重大风险，亟需开发针对性防御机制以保护关键工业系统。

Abstract: Digital Twins (DTs) have emerged as pivotal enablers of Industry 4.0, offering transformative capabilities such as real-time monitoring, advanced simulation, and precise control of physical assets. By bridging the physical and virtual domains, DTs facilitate seamless integration of data-driven decision-making and operational optimisation. However, this seamless interaction significantly expands the attack surface of industrial systems, creating vulnerabilities that adversaries can exploit. This paper introduces a novel and stealthy wear-out attack leveraging Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) to target DT-enabled infrastructures. The adversary strategically and covertly manipulates control signals, inducing increased torque on a specific joint to accelerate wear and tear while evading detection by a state-of-the-art anomaly detection system. Extensive benchmarking of reinforcement learning algorithms - including Twin Delayed Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (TD3), Soft Actor-Critic (SAC), Proximal Policy Optimisation (PPO), and Advantage Actor-Critic (A2C) - revealed that SAC consistently outperformed its counterparts in terms of sample efficiency, stability, and overall attack effectiveness. We evaluate the proposed adversary in an industrial setting using the UR10e robotic arm. Results demonstrate the adversary's ability to significantly elevate torque levels on the targeted joint, leading to accelerated degradation and increased maintenance costs, all while operating stealthily and avoiding detection. Our findings highlight the substantial risks posed by DRL-driven adversaries to DT-enabled environments and emphasise the critical need for robust defence mechanisms to protect critical industrial systems.

</details>


### [346] [SoK: Federated Learning for Intrusion Detection in Vehicular Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10914)
*Yahya Shahsavari,Reza Nourmohammadi,Sara Rouhani,Kaiwen Zhang*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文系统梳理了车载联邦学习入侵检测领域的研究，指出现有方法存在数据分割不现实、基准测试过于简单、对抗评估不足等问题，并提出了未来研究方向和最低基准要求。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代车载网络面临内部ECU和外部V2X通信的广泛攻击面，联邦学习虽能保护隐私地部署入侵检测系统，但该领域研究存在方法论碎片化和实验设置不切实际的问题，亟需系统化梳理与规范。

Method: 对60余篇论文进行审计，统一了车载攻击面的分类体系，评估了联邦学习拓扑结构，映射了投毒攻击和推理攻击等对抗威胁，并识别出常见缺陷。

Result: 发现四大共性问题：人工IID数据分割、依赖简单基准数据集、对抗评估薄弱、忽略实时CAN总线约束。

Conclusion: 提出了前瞻性研究议程和最低基准测试要求，以推动车载FL-IDS从乐观模拟走向安全、真实的实际部署。

Abstract: Modern vehicular networks face an expanding attack surface across internal Electronic Control Units (ECUs) and external Vehicle-to-Everything (V2X) communication. Federated Learning (FL) has emerged as a decentralized paradigm to deploy Intrusion Detection Systems (IDS) without compromising data privacy. However, the vehicular FL-IDS literature suffers from fragmented methodologies and unrealistic experimental setups. This paper presents a Systematization of Knowledge (SoK) that unifies the taxonomy of vehicular attack surfaces, evaluates FL topologies, and maps adversarial threats such as poisoning and inference attacks. By auditing over 60 publications, we identify recurring pitfalls: artificial IID data splits, reliance on trivial benchmarks, weak adversarial evaluation, and omission of real-time CAN constraints. Finally, we define a forward-looking research agenda and outline minimum benchmarking requirements necessary to transition vehicular FL-IDS from optimistic simulations to secure, real-world deployment.

</details>


### [347] [ARMOR-IMC: Adaptive Resource Mapping for Operational Robustness via Secure In-Memory Computing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10938)
*Muhtasim Alam Chowdhury,Ramtin Zand,Soheil Salehi*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出一种后训练框架，同时防御模拟存内计算加速器中的工艺变化（PV）和侧信道攻击（SCA），无需重新训练模型，通过VIS指标引导FOW映射和LPI指标量化功耗泄漏，实验证明能恢复因PV导致的50%以上精度损失并抵御攻击。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统架构中数据搬运开销大，存内计算（IMC）虽能绕过"存储墙"并降低漏电，但引入了工艺变化（PV）降低可靠性和脆弱性，以及功耗侧信道攻击（SCA）威胁安全，现有防御方法孤立处理这两种威胁，缺乏统一解决方案。

Method: 提出后训练框架，在IMAC-Sim模拟器中实现。使用Variation Impact Score (VIS)指导Fault Observation Windows (FOWs)的映射，引入Leakage Per Inference (LPI)指标量化输入相关的功耗可变性及有效信噪比降低程度。

Result: PV导致的故障可使精度下降超50%，所提方法能恢复接近基线的精度，并减轻基于相关性的功耗分析攻击威胁。

Conclusion: 该后训练框架能同时有效抵御工艺变化和侧信道攻击，无需重新训练，为模拟存内计算加速器提供了一种综合性的硬件安全与可靠性保障方案。

Abstract: The massive data-movement overhead in traditional architectures has led to the adoption of In-Memory Computing (IMC) for energy-efficient Deep Neural Network (DNN) processing. By leveraging emerging devices like Spin-Orbit Torque Magnetic Tunnel Junctions (SOT-MTJs), IMC bypasses the "memory wall" and reduces leakage power inherent in traditional CMOS. However, this shift introduces dual hardware threats: manufacturing Process Variation (PV) degrades reliability and increases vulnerability to fault injection, while power Side-Channel Attacks (SCAs) compromise security. Existing defenses address these threats in isolation. This work presents a posttraining framework that simultaneously hardens analog IMC accelerators against both threats without retraining the model. Implemented in the IMAC-Sim simulator, our approach uses the proposed Variation Impact Score (VIS) to guide the mapping of Fault Observation Windows (FOWs) and introduces the Leakage Per Inference (LPI) metric to quantify input-dependent power variability under stochastic injection and the resulting reduction in effective signal-to-noise ratio. Experiments show that PV-induced faults can degrade accuracy by over 50%, while our method restores near-baseline accuracy and mitigates the threat of correlation-based power analysis attacks.

</details>


### [348] [Rethinking MCP Security: A Large-Scale Study of Runtime MCP Servers and Security Scanner Reliability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11086)
*Pei Chen,Baichao An,Mengying Wu,Binwang Wan,Geng Hong,Jinsong Chen,Xudong Pan,Jiarun Dai,Min Yang*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出了MCPZoo——目前最大的MCP服务器动态分析集合（包含64,611个唯一服务器），通过多智能体框架将静态仓库转化为动态服务。基于该数据集，研究首次对MCP服务器安全性进行生态级测量，发现现有扫描器报告96.89%服务器存在风险，但人工验证显示不到50%的警报为真阳性，且扫描器间存在明显不一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: MCP协议已成为LLM代理与外部工具交互的标准接口，但MCP服务器被赋予安全敏感操作时，真实风险理解不足。现有安全扫描器仅基于少量案例，评估可靠性未知。

Method: 构建多智能体框架，模拟人类专家构建、诊断和修复部署缺陷的过程，结合环境推理与反馈驱动优化，将静态仓库转化为可动态分析的MCP服务器。通过真实协议交互验证运行时可用性，构建MCPZoo数据集。

Result: MCPZoo包含64,611个唯一MCP服务器（总计113,927个），其中37,288个支持动态分析。现有扫描器报告96.89%服务器存在风险，但人工验证显示真阳性率低于50%，且不同扫描器输出结果不一致。

Conclusion: MCPZoo实现了大规模可复现的MCP服务器安全测量，揭示了当前扫描实践存在局限性。研究发布公开查询接口以支持实际风险评估。

Abstract: The Model Context Protocol (MCP) has rapidly established itself as a standard interface for enabling LLM-based agents to interact with external tools and services. As MCP servers are increasingly entrusted with security-sensitive operations, understanding their real-world risks has become critical. In practice, due to the absence of large-scale runtime MCP servers, such understanding largely relies on security scanners applied to a small number of cases, yet the reliability of these assessments remains unclear.
  In this study, we revisit how MCP security is measured. We present MCPZoo, the largest collection of MCP servers for dynamic analysis to date. MCPZoo is constructed through a multi-agent framework for transforming in-the-wild static repositories into dynamic services. The framework emulates how human experts build, diagnose, and iteratively repair deployment and runtime defects by combining environment inference with feedback-driven refinement. To ensure practical interactivity at runtime, the servers are validated via real protocol interactions. As a result, MCPZoo contains 64,611 unique MCP servers (113,927 in total), with more than 37,288 supporting dynamic analysis. Leveraging MCPZoo, we conduct the first ecosystem-scale measurement of MCP servers and the scanners that analyze them. While existing scanners report that 96.89% of servers are risky, we find that these signals are unreliable. In particular, manual validation shows that less than 50% of sampled alerts are true positives, and scanner outputs exhibit clear inconsistency across scanners. Overall, MCPZoo enables large-scale, reproducible measurement of MCP server security and exposes limitations of current scanning practices. We further release a public query interface to support practical risk assessment of MCP servers.

</details>


### [349] [AMT-X: Phase-Structured Multi-Turn Red-Teaming with Checklist-Gated Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11151)
*Yi Ting Shen,Kentaroh Toyoda,Alex Leung*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 提出AMT-X框架，通过多阶段状态机攻击和多角色陪审团评分，揭示LLM在自适应多轮攻击下存在高达33个百分点的“部分可操作”与“完全可操作”危害差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM安全评估依赖单轮攻击数据集和单裁判评分，低估了自适应多轮对手的风险，且单一成功率指标无法区分部分可操作输出与包含完整操作细节的输出。

Method: 提出AMT-X（自适应多轮利用）框架，将攻击建模为显式可复现的多阶段状态机，由受害模型的语义信号驱动；采用多角色陪审团评分，通过阶段条件检查清单来判定可操作危害。

Result: 在六个前沿受害模型和七个Moderation子类别上，宽松阈值下攻击成功率达97.6-100%，但在要求完整、真实、可操作细节的严格阈值下降至66.7-78.6%，两类危害之间差距高达33个百分点。

Conclusion: 现有安全评估方法严重低估了LLM在自适应多轮攻击下的实际风险，需要更精细的评分机制来区分不同严重程度的危害。

Abstract: Safety evaluation of large language models (LLMs) relies largely on single-turn attack datasets and single-judge scoring, underestimating risk from adaptive multi-turn adversaries and reporting a single success rate that does not separate partially actionable outputs from those carrying complete operational detail. We propose AMT-X (Adaptive Multi-Turn Exploitation), a phase-structured multi-turn red-teaming framework. Unlike prior multi-turn attacks that rely on ad hoc escalation or free-form per-goal plans, AMT-X casts the attack as an explicit, reproducible multi-phase state machine driven by semantic signals from the victim, and replaces single-judge scoring with a multi-role jury whose phase-conditioned checklists gate success on actionable harm. Across six frontier victim models (queried under their default safety alignment, without added moderation layers) and seven Moderation sub-categories, AMT-X attains overall attack success rates of 97.6-100% under a lenient score threshold, but 66.7-78.6% under a stricter gate requiring complete, real, and operational detail: a gap of up to 33 percentage points between partially and fully actionable harm.

</details>


### [350] [Prezta: Provable Remote Execution of Zero-Trust Authorization using SNARKs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11466)
*Zhongjing Wei,Osaid Muhammad Ameer,Yupeng Zhang,Nikita Borisov*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 提出Prezta架构，利用零知识虚拟机在客户端执行授权策略并生成可验证证明，从而消除OT系统的应用网关，同时保持零信任安全。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有OT安全方案依赖应用网关，但网关存在部署分散、补丁更新困难、停机管理成本高等问题，亟需一种无需网关即可实现零信任授权的架构。

Method: 将XACML 3.0策略编译为Rust代码，在RISC Zero零知识虚拟机上执行，生成简洁的授权证明，边缘设备可高效验证；通过预编译正则表达式、优化签名验证和JWT解析来降低证明开销。

Result: 编译器正确覆盖83%的XACML 3.0符合性测试；证明生成在桌面端数十秒内完成，验证仅需数十毫秒，适合资源受限的边缘设备。

Conclusion: Prezta证明了零知识证明技术可以消除OT系统中的网关瓶颈，在保持零信任安全的同时大幅降低部署和管理负担。

Abstract: Modernizing the security of operational technology systems that control critical infrastructure has become a pressing challenge. Because edge devices have limited capabilities, modernization has relied on application gateways that interface with identity management systems and enforce access policies. These gateways are powerful enough to perform complex authorization decisions and support zero-trust architectures, but they create major deployment and management burdens: they must be collocated with remote, distributed edge devices, kept up to date with security patches, and managed with minimal downtime.
  We propose Provable Remote Execution of Zero-Trust Authorization (Prezta), an architecture that eliminates these gateways by evaluating policies within a zero-knowledge virtual machine (zkVM) running on the client. The zkVM produces a succinct proof of authorization that edge devices can verify efficiently, extending the zero-trust security envelope to the edge. Policies and identity management schemes can evolve without updating edge devices.
  To demonstrate the feasibility of Prezta, we implement a prototype built using the RISC Zero zkVM that supports XACML 3.0 policies and JWT identity claims. While zkVMs introduce substantial proof overhead, we mitigate this overhead by compiling policies to Rust code and precompiling regular expressions. Combined with optimized signature verification and JWT parsing, these measures reduce prover time by more than an order of magnitude. Our compiler correctly implements 83\% of the XACML 3.0 conformance suite, with proof generation completing in tens of seconds on a desktop. Verification, by contrast, takes only tens of milliseconds, which is fast enough for resource-constrained edge devices.

</details>


### [351] [LLM-Guided Program Evolution for Targeted Black-Box Attacks on Perceptual Hash Algorithms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11472)
*A. Krylov,D. Rakhov,V. Veselova,D. Bolokhov,Oleg Y. Rogov*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 提出基于进化算法（GigaEvo/OpenEvolve）的黑盒攻击框架，针对感知哈希算法进行目标性二次图像攻击，在更少查询次数和更低L2失真下实现高攻击成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 感知哈希算法在良性变换下广泛用于图像伪造检测，但其对对抗性扰动的鲁棒性缺乏理解和可证明保证。

Method: 基于GigaEvo和OpenEvolve的进化框架，采用复合攻击评分（攻击成功率+查询次数+L2失真），无需模型内部知识即可处理哈希输出的非可微离散特性。

Result: 在四种PHA（pHash, PDQ, PhotoDNA, NeuralHash）和30对ImageNet图像上，进化攻击相比黑盒基线用更少查询达到相当或更优ASR，且L2失真更低；复合攻击评分降低8.1%~41.2%。

Conclusion: 揭示了广泛部署的内容审核管线中此前未报告的漏洞，激励开发可证明鲁棒的感知哈希方案。

Abstract: Perceptual hash algorithms (PHAs) are widely deployed to detect image forgery under benign transformations, yet their robustness against adversarially chosen perturbations remains poorly understood and rarely comes with provable guarantees. We propose a novel evolutionary framework based on GigaEvo and OpenEvolve for targeted second-image attacks on perceptual hash algorithms. We assess attack performance using a composite score that jointly accounts for the fraction of adversarial images whose normalized Hamming distance to the target hash falls below threshold p (Attack Success Rate), the number of queries issued to the hash function, and the L2 distortion relative to the original image. Experiments on four deployed PHAs (pHash, PDQ, PhotoDNA, NeuralHash) across 30 ImageNet image pairs demonstrate that our evolutionary approach achieves comparable or better ASR than existing black-box baselines using substantially fewer queries to the hash function, while simultaneously producing adversarial images with lower L2 distortion relative to the originals. The best evolved programs reduce the pre-defined composite attack score relative to the best optimized seed by 41.2% for NeuralHash, 38.3% for PDQ, 34.0% for pHash, and 8.1% for PhotoDNA. Unlike gradient-based methods, our framework requires no internal knowledge of PHA architectures and naturally handles the non-differentiable, discretized nature of hash outputs. These results reveal previously unreported vulnerabilities in widely deployed content-moderation pipelines and motivate the development of provably robust perceptual hashing 1schemes.

</details>


### [352] [Time Is Money: Incentivized Causal Transaction Ordering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11496)
*Hongyin Chen,Xu Zheng,Jichen Li,Ittay Eyal*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: PRECEDE 提出了一种基于幂加权随机抽奖的交易排序机制，通过消除经济激励来防止区块链中的抢跑攻击，并实现了因果关系强制执行。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 区块链中的抢跑攻击（front-running）持续侵蚀用户发布功能性交易的激励，现有排序方法（如按出价排序）无法实现因果关系，导致用户易受攻击。

Method: 采用幂加权随机抽奖（power-weighted randomized lottery）排序交易，获胜概率随出价超线性增长，从而在用户与攻击者之间形成均衡博弈。

Result: 用户通过发布带有威慑性出价的交易即可达到均衡状态，使攻击者放弃竞争；同时有效防止了依赖抢跑的夹击攻击（sandwich attack）。

Conclusion: PRECEDE 可直接部署于任何抗审查的区块链，仅需简单修改交易排序机制即可实现因果关系保护。

Abstract: Front-running is a subtle and persistent problem for blockchains. A blockchain is a stateful virtual machine executing instructions called transactions. Users earn rewards by publishing functional transactions essential to the system. Attackers observe these transactions and publish their own ahead of the users', seizing the reward and eroding users' incentive to publish functional transactions. Preventing front-running means enforcing causality: If an attacker receives transaction tx_A and then publishes transaction tx_B, then tx_A must be ordered before tx_B. However, this causality is only observed by the attacker. Practical systems order transactions by bid amount, so transactions willing to pay more get executed first, but this only results in a bidding war eroding users' rewards. Though numerous ordering approaches have been proposed, none achieves causality, leaving users vulnerable to front-running.
  We present PRECEDE, a mechanism-design approach that enforces transaction causality by removing the economic incentive to front-run. PRECEDE orders transactions by a power-weighted randomized lottery, whose winning probability grows super-linearly in the bid. The user's strategy of publishing a transaction with a deterring bid forms an equilibrium where the attacker refrains from competing. Moreover, PRECEDE prevents the prominent sandwich attack, which relies on front-running. PRECEDE can be directly deployed in any censorship-resistant blockchain with a simple change to its transaction ordering mechanism.

</details>


### [353] [Graph-Based Structural Evaluation of LLM-Translated Adversary Emulation Procedures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11517)
*Ahmed M. Elmisery*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出图结构评估方法（GBSE），用于评估LLM将攻击模拟方案跨操作系统翻译的保真度。该方法通过四层图编辑距离（GED）评估结构等价性，发现翻译后的Linux方案在技术/战术结构上完全保留，但遥测层相似度下降至0.897，整体未达到0.80的部署阈值，揭示了跨平台翻译中逻辑漂移和保真度不足的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的二进制评分方法高估翻译保真度，因为它们仅统计可计数特征（如工具名称替换），而忽略了结构、可观测性和规则层面的等价性。跨操作系统翻译攻击方案需要更细粒度的评估方法，以确保防御者获得真正的目标平台覆盖。

Method: 提出图结构评估（GBSE）框架，将每个攻击步骤建模为有向属性图，在四个层次（技术、战术、遥测类、Sigma日志源）上计算归一化图编辑距离（GED）。还包括二分图GED、遥测意图解析器（将自由文本转换为可观测类）和49条验证过的Sigma规则。

Result: 在ALPHV/BlackCat的Windows到Linux翻译中，技术/战术结构完全保留（GED=0，相似度1.000）；遥测相似度0.897（GED=3），因三步存在未映射或漂移的可观测项；Sigma日志源相似度1.000。所有状态分类为中等保真度，最佳综合得分0.674，未达到0.80部署阈值。

Conclusion: GBSE能有效揭示跨平台翻译中的保真度问题，包括RDP外部访问被映射为未加密外泄、凭证库访问被映射为远程系统发现等技术级偏差。该方法为自动化翻译评估提供了结构化、多层次的度量标准，但当前LLM翻译尚未达到可靠部署所需的保真度。

Abstract: Adversary emulation plans describe multi-step attacker procedures using MITRE ATT&CK techniques, privilege requirements, and observable telemetry. Translating them across operating systems supports cross-platform defender evaluation, and large language models (LLMs) can automate this task. However, a translation may only rename tools while retaining source-platform logic, giving defenders little target-platform coverage. Binary scoring can overestimate fidelity because it measures countable features rather than structural, observable, and rule-level equivalence. Graph-Based Structural Evaluation (GBSE) models each procedure as a directed attributed graph and calculates normalized Graph Edit Distance (GED) across four layers: technique, tactic, telemetry class, and Sigma logsource. GBSE was applied to a 29-step ALPHV/BlackCat Windows-to-Linux plan, comparing a reconstructed Windows control with the unmodified LLM-generated Linux version. Technique and tactic structure were fully preserved (GED=0, similarity=1.000). Telemetry similarity fell to 0.897 (GED=3) because three steps contained unmapped or drifting observables, while Sigma logsource similarity was 1.000. Every state was classified as Medium Fidelity, with a best composite score of 0.674. The 0.80 deployment threshold was not reached because technical realism scored 0.43 against the required 0.990. The framework includes bipartite GED, a telemetry-intent parser that converts free text into observable classes, and 49 validated Sigma rules: 19 for Linux and 30 for Windows. The rules provide complete ATT&CK technique coverage and pass validation with zero findings. Additional analysis reveals technique-level divergence, including RDP-based external access mapped to unencrypted exfiltration and credential-store access mapped to remote-system discovery. Results were reproduced and verified against recorded outputs.

</details>


### [354] [Linux disk encryption and self-encrypting drives -- A case study on Opal2 drives security](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11563)
*Milan Brož,Tamara Čierniková,Ondřej Kozina,Vladimír Sedláček*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文通过对38款商用Opal2自加密硬盘进行黑盒测试，发现了固件安全漏洞和兼容性问题，并负责任地披露给厂商，推动了Linux磁盘加密工具的改进，同时开源了测试工具集。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 评估Opal2自加密硬盘在Linux系统中的实际集成安全性，发现固件层面的安全问题和兼容性问题，弥补现有研究的不足。

Method: 搭建包含38款来自不同厂商的商用Opal2硬盘的测试平台，采用黑盒测试方法对固件安全性和Linux集成情况进行系统性评估。

Result: 发现了多个固件安全漏洞和兼容性问题，已负责任披露给相关厂商；研究成果推动了所有主流Linux发行版中磁盘加密工具的改进。

Conclusion: Opal2自加密硬盘存在实际安全问题，但通过负责任的披露和开源测试工具，能够促进厂商改进并帮助社区进行独立评估。

Abstract: Opal2 self-encrypting drives provide hardware-based disk encryption serving as an additional layer of protection, or a replacement, for software-based solutions. This paper presents a case study of real-world Linux integration of Opal2 drives and the security of Opal2 firmware. The study was conducted on a testbed of 38 commercial off-the-shelf Opal2 drives from various vendors using a black-box approach. We identified several firmware security issues and incompatibilities, which we responsibly disclosed to respective vendors. Our findings led to improvements in Linux disk encryption tools used across all major Linux distributions. To enable independent evaluation for the public, we release our test scenarios for Opal2 drives as an open-source toolset.

</details>


### [355] [Cardano's Voltaire Governance: Complete Specification and Research Program](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11601)
*Nimrod Talmon,Oghenekaro Elem*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文对Cardano的Voltaire治理系统（通过CIP-1694和Chang硬分叉实现）进行了完整技术规范，并提出了一个治理优化研究议程，包括基于智能体的模拟平台、委托动态分析、多目标参数优化和博弈论激励设计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 区块链治理在平衡适应性、安全性和利益相关者代表性方面仍面临根本性挑战，需要系统化的研究和优化框架。

Method: 1) 提供Voltaire机制的完整技术规范（三体架构、七种治理行动类型、投票规则、宪法框架）；2) 建立研究议程并给出初步结果，包括形式化治理内核（将自修订治理建模为状态转换系统）。

Result: 完成Voltaire系统的完整规格说明，并提供了形式化治理内核这一最小可执行模型，支持安全性和活跃性分析。

Conclusion: 该报告提供了全面技术概述，并邀请研究社区将Voltaire作为一个活的、大规模实验来推进区块链治理科学。

Abstract: Blockchain governance, the set of processes by which decentralized protocols evolve, remains a fundamental challenge in balancing adaptability, security, and stakeholder representation. This technical report analyzes Cardano's Voltaire governance system, the on-chain framework introduced via CIP-1694 and enacted through the Chang hard fork in September 2024, and lays down a corresponding research program.
  We make two contributions. First, we provide a complete technical specification of Voltaire's mechanisms, including its three-body architecture, seven governance action types, voting rules, and its constitutional framework; this specification is sufficient for implementation or formal analysis. Second, we establish a research agenda for principled governance optimization, including design of an agent-based simulation platform, analysis of delegation dynamics, optimization of multi-objective parameters, and game-theoretic incentive design; we provide preliminary results, including a formal governance kernel: a minimal executable model capturing self-amending governance as a state-transition system and enabling rigorous safety and liveness analysis.
  Our report offers a comprehensive technical overview and invites the research community to advance blockchain governance science through rigorous study of Voltaire as a live, large-scale experiment now managing a treasury valued at approximately \$235 million (1.47B ADA as of early July 2026).

</details>


### [356] [Closing the Loop: An Access-Control Architecture for Automated, Anomaly-Driven Network Revocation in IoT Deployments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11649)
*Muhammet Emir Korkmaz,Kemal Bicakci,Yusuf Uzunay*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于IEEE 802.1X和RADIUS的物联网异常检测闭环架构，利用标准协议实现自动阻断与证书撤销，检测器AUC达0.9964，平均335.8ms完成设备驱逐。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有物联网异常检测系统仅止于告警，缺乏基于标准协议的自动化执行机制，无法在实际网络中闭环响应。

Method: 采用IEEE 802.1X/EAP-TLS认证，RADIUS服务器作为持续策略决策点，通过CoA Disconnect-Request驱逐设备，结合证书撤销实现永久排除；检测器将先前的MUD/SDN多流水线模型替换为单融合模型（聚类+流量体积+协议签名），基于被动流量捕获。

Result: 在单测试设备上AUC达0.9964，检测全部24种攻击场景，训练数据减少约43倍；平均驱逐时间335.8ms，证书撤销额外111.5ms。

Conclusion: 验证了闭环架构的可行性，多设备泛化是下一步工作。

Abstract: Network-based anomaly detection for IoT devices has matured to the point of reporting strong detection accuracy, yet most published systems stop at raising an alert and leave the question of automated enforcement to future work or to a programmable data plane that few real networks operate. This paper presents an access-control architecture that closes that loop using only standard, already-deployed protocols. Devices authenticate via IEEE 802.1X with EAP-TLS, and a RADIUS server acts as a continuous policy decision point capable of evicting an active session via a Change-of-Authorization Disconnect-Request and permanently excluding a device through certificate revocation. A central, contextual access policy engine continuously consumes the anomaly detector's output and actuates this response over a narrowly restricted channel to the RADIUS server; the same engine is designed to be extensible to other access types, though this paper evaluates only the network access-control mechanism. This mechanism is driven by an anomaly signal from a one-class detector adapted from a prior MUD/SDN-based design, replacing its per-flow multi-model pipeline with passive traffic capture and a single fused model that combines a cluster-based, a volumetric, and a protocol-signature score. On a single testbed device, the detector reaches an AUC of 0.9964 and detects all 24 evaluated attack scenarios (eight attack types at three intensities) using roughly 43$\times$ less training data than the reference design, and the resulting alerts reliably trigger the automated disconnect-then-revoke response, which we measure to evict a device from the network in 335.8\,ms on average and complete certificate revocation in a further 111.5\,ms. We report this evaluation as a demonstration of the closed-loop architecture rather than of the detector itself, and discuss multi-device generalization as a concrete next step.

</details>


### [357] [Agent Hacks Agent: Autoresearch for Production-Agent Red-Teaming](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11698)
*Xutao Mao,Xiang Zheng,Cong Wang*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 提出AHA框架，通过自动化红队测试发现生产环境LLM智能体的可复用漏洞知识，生成漏洞概念图（VCG），在Claude Code和Codex等智能体上比最强基线高出14.2个百分点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有红队测试主要优化攻击成功率并保存攻击成功记录，但缺乏对不安全行为背后触发条件的系统化理解。生产环境LLM智能体（如Claude Code、Codex）处理不可信内容时，安全失败会直接造成危害，亟需可复用、可审计的漏洞知识发现方法。

Method: 提出AHA（可证伪发现循环）：提出漏洞假设→构造证伪器→实例化有效攻击→沙箱执行→轨迹反思→将确认发现提升为漏洞概念图（VCG）。每个概念包含声明、触发条件、证伪器、迁移预测和支撑证据。

Result: 在Claude Code和Codex上，针对直接/间接攻击三种场景，发现的概念揭示了跨模型和跨智能体的可复用漏洞核心。冻结的VCG无需进一步搜索，在相同单次协议下比最强冻结发现基线高出14.2个百分点，且能跨场景和攻击通道迁移。

Conclusion: VCG提供了可审计的产物，供生产安全团队检查漏洞、验证补丁并积累可复用安全知识。代码已开源。

Abstract: Production LLM agents such as Claude Code and Codex operate over untrusted content, files, commands, and workspace state, making safety failures directly actionable. Red-teaming must therefore keep pace with evolving models and tools. Existing approaches mainly optimize attack success and preserve artifacts such as benchmarks, payloads, or attack programs, which record where attacks succeed but not the enabling conditions behind unsafe agent behavior. We study automated red-teaming for production LLM agents using one agentic research environment to discover reusable vulnerability knowledge about another. We present AHA, a falsifiable discovery loop that proposes a vulnerability hypothesis, constructs a falsifier, instantiates a valid attack, executes it in a sandboxed harness, reflects on the trajectory, and promotes confirmed findings into a Vulnerability Concept Graph (VCG). Each concept links an attacker-facing surface to an unsafe trajectory through a claim, enabling condition, falsifier, transfer prediction, and supporting evidence. Across Claude Code and Codex on three scenarios covering direct and indirect attacks, the discovered concepts reveal a reusable vulnerability core across models and agents. A frozen VCG requires no further search and outperforms the strongest frozen discovery baseline by 14.2 percentage points under the same single-shot protocol, while transferring across scenarios and attack channels. The resulting VCG provides an auditable artifact for production safety teams to inspect vulnerabilities, validate patches, and accumulate reusable safety knowledge. Our code is available at https://github.com/henrymao2004/Auto-research-red-teaming-in-sleep.

</details>


<div id='cs.MA'></div>

# cs.MA [[Back]](#toc)

### [358] [Transfer Learning Across Policy Regimes in Adaptive Multi-Agent Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09685)
*Roberto Garrone*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文研究政策体制变化时，迁移学习在自适应多智能体系统中的效果：当新旧体制间政策与结果关系保持稳定时，迁移学习有益；当关系发生结构性变化时，迁移学习会产生负迁移效应。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统政策模型假设政策工具与结果的关系在不同制度条件下保持稳定，但在自适应社会技术系统中这一假设可能失效。本文旨在系统研究政策体制变化对学习效果的影响，并比较从头学习与迁移学习在不同场景下的优劣。

Method: 将政策体制建模为以可观测输入分布和目标函数（政策变量到结果的映射）驱动的学习问题；通过对比白板学习器（在新体制中搜索灵活假设类）与迁移学习器（被先前体制的结构性知识限制假设类）的表现，分析迁移学习的利弊。

Result: 在排放税与排放量保持仿射单调关系的目标体制中，迁移学习提升了小样本表现；当目标体制引入阈值断点时，同一迁移结构产生负迁移，表现为留出误差居高不下、在线预测失误增多、累计误差和最终窗口误差增大。

Conclusion: 方法贡献：当政策变化保留了稳定的结构不变量时，应重用先前监管经验；但当政策变化改变了政策与结果的关系时，需谨慎对待迁移。

Abstract: Policy models often assume that the relationship between a policy instrument and its outcome remains stable across institutional conditions. In adaptive socio-technical systems this assumption may fail: regulatory change can alter incentives, agents can respond strategically, and the mapping from policy variables to aggregate outcomes can change. This paper studies such regime change as a transfer-learning problem in adaptive multi-agent systems. A policy regime is represented as a learning problem induced by an observable input distribution and a target function mapping policy variables to outcomes. We compare a blank-slate learner that searches a flexible hypothesis class in the new regime with a transfer learner whose effective hypothesis class is restricted by structural knowledge from the previous regime. Transfer is beneficial when this restriction preserves the new target function while reducing effective complexity; it is harmful when the restriction excludes the new target and creates misspecification. A stylized emissions-regulation experimental environment and a dynamic ABM robustness experiment support the claim. When the target regime preserves an affine monotone tax-emissions relation, transfer improves empirical small-sample performance. When the target regime introduces a threshold break, the same transferred structure produces negative transfer: held-out error remains high, online prediction generates more mistakes, and repeated online streams show larger cumulative and final-window error under misspecification. The contribution is methodological: previous regulatory experience should be reused when it captures stable structural invariants, but treated cautiously when policy change alters the policy-outcome relationship.

</details>


### [359] [RideGym: A Standardized Interface for Real-World Large-Scale Ride-Sharing System](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10173)
*Zijian Zhao,Yulong Hu,Sen Li*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: RideGym是一个开源、标准化的Gym风格仿真平台，专门用于真实网约车系统中的多智能体强化学习（MARL）订单派发研究，通过将环境与调度算法完全解耦，支持高效的大规模城市级仿真，并揭示探索噪声对算法性能与排名的显著影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有网约车模拟平台通常针对特定任务或紧密耦合特定算法，缺乏标准化、支持学习的接口，导致研究者重复造轮子，影响可复现性与公平比较。

Method: 提出RideGym，首个开源、标准化的Gym风格接口，将环境与调度算法完全解耦，支持真实路网的大规模城市级仿真，提供灵活的车辆属性、订单配置及自动最短路径路由。

Result: 验证了RideGym的高效性：包含数千辆车和数万订单的一小时仿真可在1分钟内完成；同时发现探索噪声的选择显著影响MARL方案的性能与相对排名。

Conclusion: RideGym为网约车订单派发的MARL研究提供了标准化、可复现的开放平台，并指出探索噪声是已有研究中常被忽视但影响显著的关键因素。

Abstract: Ride-sharing has become an essential component of modern urban transportation and has attracted significant attention across computer science, transportation, and management science. While the field spans a broad range of problems, such as driver relocation, dynamic pricing, and vehicle charging or fueling dispatch, the core challenge remains order assignment and trip bundling, which directly affect urban traffic efficiency and carbon emissions. Despite its importance, existing simulation platforms are typically tailored to specific operational studies or tightly coupled to a particular dispatch algorithm, and rarely expose a standardized, learning-friendly interface. As a result, most researchers still build customized environments from scratch, raising serious concerns about reproducibility and fair comparison, and incurring substantial redundant effort. To address this gap, we present RideGym, the first open-source, standardized Gym-style interface tailored to MARL-based order dispatch in real-world ride-sharing systems. By fully decoupling the environment from the dispatch algorithm, RideGym enables diverse learning-based and model-based methods to be developed and compared under identical, fully specified conditions. It supports efficient, large-scale city-level simulations on real road networks, and offers flexible configurations for vehicle attributes, order specifications, and automatic shortest-path routing. We validate RideGym by reproducing several baselines, and demonstrate its high efficiency, with a one-hour simulation involving thousands of vehicles and tens of thousands of orders completed within one minute across all methods. Moreover, we reveal that the choice of exploration noise can significantly affect both the performance and the relative ranking of MARL solutions, an aspect often overlooked in prior work.

</details>


### [360] [Distributed Agent System: Fault-Tolerant Collaboration Among Embodied Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10811)
*Kai Yu,Lu Chen,Hanqi Li*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出分布式智能体系统（DAS），一种设备-边缘-云协同框架，通过容错对齐和半形式化语言协议实现异构智能体的可靠协作，解决长期任务中的错误累积问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型从被动文本生成转向智能体驱动的任务执行，在资源约束和环境不确定性下面临长期任务的可靠性挑战，传统错误消除策略无法处理累积误差传播。

Method: 提出DAS设备-边缘-云三层框架，包含两层容错架构：单智能体执行可靠性（容错对齐）和跨智能体通信可靠性（半形式化语言协议）。

Result: 将智能体可靠性重新定义为系统级容错而非单轮零错误准确率，为工业场景下异构具身智能体协作提供了实用工程路径。

Conclusion: DAS框架通过分布式容错设计有效应对了长期任务中的错误累积问题，为异构智能体可靠协作提供了可行的工程方案。

Abstract: AI engineering is shifting from passive text generation by large language models (LLMs) to agent-driven task execution, creating new reliability challenges for long-horizon tasks under resource constraints and environmental uncertainty. Conventional error-elimination optimization strategies fail to address cumulative error propagation. This paper proposes Distributed Agent System (DAS), a device-edge-cloud framework for fault-tolerant collaboration among heterogeneous agents. We redefine agent reliability as system-level fault tolerance rather than single-turn zero-error accuracy, and present a two-layer fault-tolerance architecture: single-agent execution reliability via fault-tolerant alignment, and cross-agent communication reliability via semi-formal language protocols. This framework provides a practical engineering pathway for reliable heterogeneous embodied agents collaboration in industrial scenarios.

</details>


### [361] [Auditing Belief-Conditioned LLM Agents in Hidden-Information Social Deduction Games](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10814)
*Yuan Gao,Jiangyi Yang,Yao Zhao,Yichi Zhang*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 在9人狼人杀环境中，通过构建外部信念状态审计框架，发现主动信念条件显著提升好人阵营胜率（从0.205到0.390），但信念与行动的直接一致性较低（约0.21），信念机制尚不明确，贡献在于可审计的框架而非信念本身。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在隐藏信息多智能体环境中评估LLM代理很困难，最终结果方差大且难以揭示决策原因。

Method: 在9人狼人杀环境中，智能体在严格代码级信息隔离下行动，构建了可审计框架，维护外部信念状态，记录信念更新和信念-行动偏差，并支持防御性离线改进循环。

Result: 在1,080场冻结游戏中，主动信念条件下好人胜率从0.205升至0.390（McNemar χ²=16.4，p<0.001），女巫毒药错误减少；但信念-行动一致性低（约0.21），给狼人信念比给好人信念对好人更有利。

Conclusion: 外部信念在高噪声隐藏信息游戏中主要作为可审计的认知基线，带有决策相关信息，将不透明的智能体行为转化为可回放的证据，支持更安全、受控的迭代。

Abstract: Evaluating LLM agents in hidden-information multi-agent settings is hard: final outcomes are high-variance and rarely reveal why an agent decided as it did. We study this in a 9-player Werewolf environment where agents act under strict, code-level information isolation, and we build an auditable framework that maintains an external belief state over hidden roles, logs belief updates and belief-action deviations as structured evidence, and supports a defensive offline improvement loop that reviews bad cases before any strategy change.
  Across 1,080 frozen games spanning belief-disabled, active-belief, kernel-ablation, camp-restricted, consumption-policy, and high-load arms, and including a seed-paired A0/A1 comparison, the active-belief condition is associated with substantially better good-side outcomes: in the 200-seed A0/A1 comparison the good-side win rate rises from 0.205 to 0.390 (paired McNemar $χ^2 = 16.4$, $p < 0.001$), with fewer irreversible witch-poison errors. We do not, however, attribute this shift to belief content. Direct action-belief consistency is low ($\approx 0.21$), and giving belief only to the werewolves helps the good side more than giving it only to the good side, which argues against a simple holder-benefit account; we therefore report the effect as an association and treat its mechanism as unresolved. The contribution is the audit framework itself: it makes the effect measurable, exposes low direct action-belief consistency, rejects an unreliable forced-consumption intervention with evidence, and separates strategy effects from load confounds. We accordingly position external belief in high-noise hidden-information games primarily as an auditable cognitive baseline that also carries decision-relevant signal, turning opaque agent behavior into replayable evidence for safer, controlled iteration.

</details>


### [362] [Multi-Agent LLMs Fail to Explore Each Other](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11250)
*Hyeong Kyu Choi,Jiatong Li,Wendi Li,Xin Eric Wang,Sharon Li*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文指出现有LLM智能体在多智能体系统中存在探索不足的问题，提出MACE框架通过结构化同伴选择来促进探索，显著提升了任务性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM智能体在多智能体交互中表现出短视和极化行为，导致次优协调和遗憾增加，缺乏有效的探索机制。

Method: 将多智能体探索形式化为部分可观测随机博弈（POSG）问题，提出MACE框架，通过结构化同伴选择显式促进探索行为。

Result: 在上下文多样性和参数多样性场景下，MACE显著改善了智能体的探索行为和下游任务性能。从理论上证明探索的价值随智能体多样性增加而增加。

Conclusion: 当前LLM智能体存在根本性的探索局限，有引导的显式探索对实现可靠的多智能体自主性至关重要。

Abstract: Exploration is essential for reliable autonomy in multi-agent systems, yet it remains unclear whether large language model (LLM) agents can explore effectively when interacting with one another. We show that modern LLM agents fail to do so, often exhibiting myopic and polarized interaction patterns that lead to suboptimal coordination and increased regret. We formalize this challenge as the Multi-Agent Exploration problem, modeling it as a partially observable stochastic game (POSG) problem in which agents must probe peers to infer their capabilities and identify effective interaction strategies. To address this, we introduce Multi- Agent Contextual Exploration (MACE), a lightweight framework that explicitly promotes exploration through structured peer selection. Across both contextual and parametric diversity settings, MACE substantially improves exploration behavior and downstream task performance. We further show theoretically that the value of exploration increases with agent diversity. Overall, our results highlight a fundamental limitation of current LLM agents and underscore the importance of explicitly guided exploration for reliable multi-agent autonomy. Code will be released in https://github.com/deeplearning-wisc/mace

</details>


### [363] [An Explainable Agentic System for Detection of Conversational Scams with Summary-Based Memory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11707)
*Ahmed Omar Salim Adnan,Yogananda Manjunath,Shivanjali Khare*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种可解释的智能体系统，用于检测跨越多个会话的复杂对话式诈骗，并发布了首个多类别基准数据集ConScamBench-278。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有诈骗检测系统主要聚焦于孤立消息，难以应对逐渐建立信任、持续数周或数月的对话式诈骗威胁。

Method: 在单消息钓鱼检测基础上扩展，提出可解释的智能体（agentic）系统；构建包含8种诈骗类型的公共基准数据集ConScamBench-278。

Result: 单消息检测器在孤立消息上达到100%钓鱼召回率；对话级检测器在LoveFraud02语料库上识别全部83个诈骗对话，在ConScamBench-278上达到97.8%准确率。用户研究中，自我报告信任、自信和AI检测需求均显著提升（p<0.001），系统可用性评分74.7。

Conclusion: 该系统能有效检测跨会话的复杂诈骗，且具有良好的可解释性和用户接受度，填补了对话式诈骗检测领域的空白。

Abstract: Following the rapid progress of generative Artificial Intelligence, there is a growing threat posed by conversational scams. These scams often span over multiple weeks or months, gradually build trust and request for money or sensitive information. Existing scam-detection systems mainly focus on isolated messages, which renders them inadequate against this evolving threat. This paper extends single-message phishing detection and presents an explainable agentic system for detecting sophisticated conversational scams. It also introduces ConScamBench-278, an initial public multi-category benchmark for conversational scam detection spanning eight scam types, released to support reproducible evaluation and future expansion. On isolated messages the single-message detector attains 100% phishing recall, while the conversation-level detector identifies all conversational scams in the public LoveFraud02 corpus (83/83) and reaches 97.8% accuracy (95% CI [95.4, 99.0]) on ConScamBench-278. Two user studies (N = 100 and N = 45) further motivate the system: participants report frequently experiencing uncertainty when judging suspicious conversations. In an uncontrolled pre/post comparison, users self-reported trust, self-confidence, and perceived need for AI-based scam detection all increased (p < 0.001, Wilcoxon signed-rank). The system also receives a System Usability Scale score of 74.7 (95% CI [72.5, 76.9]), above the established usability benchmark.

</details>


### [364] [Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning for C-V2X RAT Selection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11744)
*Moritz Schaffenroth,Uwe Kölbel,Heike Lepke,Alexander Prinz,Alfred Höß*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出使用多智能体强化学习算法MAPPO解决混合V2X通信中的链路选择决策问题，相比传统DRL方法，在准时投递率上提升约5%（从0.508到0.535），训练时间减半，先进应用场景获益显著。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: V2X应用日益多样化（如协同驾驶、共享感知等），对通信时延和可靠性提出了异构化需求，而单一通信技术难以同时满足所有需求，需要混合通信策略来动态选择最合适的链路（Uu、PC5或同时使用）。

Method: 使用多智能体强化学习算法MAPPO（Multi-Agent Proximal Policy Optimization）进行链路选择决策，并与DRL、静态决策树及静态信道选择等五种基线方法对比，在城市场景中基于一组通信用例进行评估。

Result: MAPPO相比DRL：单控制车辆场景下准时投递率从0.508提升至0.535；所有车辆均采用学习策略时从0.548提升至0.567；训练时间减半；增益主要来自先进应用场景（而非传统CAM消息场景）。

Conclusion: 自适应通信策略对满足未来多样化V2X应用需求至关重要，多智能体建模在解决底层通信决策问题上具有显著优势。

Abstract: Vehicles are increasingly equipped with advanced V2X communication capabilities. While early V2X apps utilized services such as Cooperative Awareness Messages, recent developments have allowed more advanced applications including cooperative driving, shared perception, and sensor-sharing services. The broader mix of applications leads to heterogeneous requirements for latency and reliability. At the same time multiple communication technologies for V2X are available with pros and cons. Hybrid V2X communication can exploit the distinct advantages at the right moment to fulfill the requirements of the applications. This work studies the decision problem between cellular Uu link, NR-V2X PC5 sidelink, and the simultaneous use of both channels. We address this problem by using the multi-agent reinforcement learning algorithm MAPPO and compare it to five baselines consisting of a deep reinforcement learning (DRL) approach, a static decision tree approach and static channel selection strategies. The methods are evaluated in an urban scenario and with a set of selected communication use cases. The evaluation results show that when compared to the DRL approach, the on-time delivery ratio improves from 0.508 to 0.535 in a single-controlled-vehicle setting and from 0.548 to 0.567 when all vehicles follow the learned policy and reduces the training time by half. The gains result mainly from the advanced applications scenarios, as opposed to scenarios involving exclusively CAM messaging. This indicates future applications will benefit from such adaptive communication strategies and that multi-agent modelling is useful for addressing the underlying decision problem.

</details>
